omopColumns.name: nhs_number

dataSource.name: NhsNumber
dataSource.description: The unique NHS Number assigned to every patient registered with the NHS in England and Wales.

omopColumns.query:
with ct as (
    select distinct
        Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NHSNumber,

        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment.CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment[*].CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], recursive := true) as ProcedureDate,

        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment.CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment[*].CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], recursive := true) as PrimaryProcedureOPCS
    from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81
    where type = 'CT'
)
select distinct
    NHSNumber,
    ProcedureDate,
    PrimaryProcedureOPCS
from ct
where NHSNumber is not null
  and PrimaryProcedureOPCS is not null;

omopColumns.name: procedure_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Maps concepts to standard valid concepts in the `procedure` domain.

omopColumns.name: procedure_date

dataSource.name: ProcedureDate
dataSource.description: Date relevant to the activity for the procedure date. Same as the ACTIVITY DATE attribute for "Procedure Date".

omopColumns.query:
with ct as (
    select distinct
        Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NHSNumber,

        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment.CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment[*].CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], recursive := true) as ProcedureDate,

        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment.CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreTreatment[*].CTYACoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], recursive := true) as PrimaryProcedureOPCS
    from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81
    where type = 'CT'
)
select distinct
    NHSNumber,
    ProcedureDate,
    PrimaryProcedureOPCS
from ct
where NHSNumber is not null
  and PrimaryProcedureOPCS is not null;

omopColumns.name: procedure_type_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `32828`. `EHR episode record`

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_value

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Resolve OPCS4 codes to OMOP concepts. If code cannot be mapped, map using the parent code.

dataSource.name: PrimaryProcedureOpcs
